form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last outing finished third of 7 starters at Fontwell Park on March 27 over 4300m, 11 len behind Motazzen with 75.5kg at $4.50. Before that finished second of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 3300m, on slow going 6 len behind Halftheworldaway carrying 71.5kg at $12. Has been racing well. Hard to fault on her best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth of 7 starters at Huntingdon on April 4 over 4100m, 49 len behind Kentucky River carrying 73kg at $23. The run before finished eighth of 10 starters at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 2400m, 17 len behind Everest with 61kg at $81. Likely to find this too tough without big improvement.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming finished third of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 3300m, slow track; 7 len behind Halftheworldaway carrying 71.5kg at $13. form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 3 of 16 runners at Taunton December 11 over 4800m, 1.75 len behind Alright Dai with 71kg at $26. When resuming last campaign 4 of 12 runners at Huntingdon November 2 over 3900m, 14 len behind Vivid Pink carrying 72kg at $26. Sure to prove tough to stop.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up eased back early on finished fourth in a small field at Chepstow on February 13 over 3200m, slow track; 15 len behind Aqua Bleu carrying 70kg at $11. Second-up finished second in a small field at Ffos Las on March 1 over 3200m, on a wet track; 6 len behind Francky Blue with 67kg at $2.60. Impressed last start. On his best jumping form is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished second of 9 starters at Stratford-On-Avon on March 28 over 4400m, 1.0 len behind Harbour Light carrying 66kg at $3.80. The start before that; finished second of 11 runners at this track on March 7 over 3900m, 1.3 len behind By The Grace with 67kg at $8. Has been racing well. Best form over the jumps stacks up well.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 5 in a small field at this track February 11 over 4300m, in the wet; 29 len behind Springtime Legend carrying 64.5kg at $7. form.formComment: Resuming after a two months break. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Lingfield February 5 over 3200m, on heavy track; 51 len behind El Rojo Grande with 62kg at $11.
